name: Different Dimension Encounter
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>異</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>次</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>元</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>邂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>逅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If both players have at least 1 banished monster that can be Special Summoned: Each player Special Summons 1 of their banished monsters in face-down Defense Position.
eff: If both players have at least 1 banished monster that can be Special Summoned: Each player Special Summons 1 of their banished monsters in face-down Defense Position.

sets.set: Speed Duel GX: Duelists of Shadows

summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
Special Summons the opponent's banished monsters to the opponent's field
Sets the opponent's banished cards to the opponent's field
